behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file path, class DagRunInfo, includes list, keys partition_key/partition_date, ISO 8601 format, and ordering constraints all tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what fields to add and ordering requirements but doesn't show the exact diff/line to modify.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (keys in dict, values, ordering relative to other fields, presence in includes list) which any valid fix would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import DagRunInfo and call it via subprocess, inspecting the dict output.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual serialization with correct values and ordering, not satisfiable by stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Presence, values, ordering, uniqueness, and includes-list requirement all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings explaining each aspect tested.

structured_data_schema.reason: Schema for partition_key (string) and partition_date (ISO 8601 with timezone) documented in instruction.

no_typos.reason: Paths and field names are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the file/class but doesn't specify buggy line; localization within file still required.
